title: Poscendo
description: A configurable client-side mod making various tweaks to potions.
body:
**Description:**

- Poscendo is a configurable client-side mod making various tweaks to potions. Any changes Poscendo makes should be compatible with most mods out of the box!

 

**Features:**
- Potions and Tipped Arrows modified using either redstone or glowstone have a prefix in their names to help distinguish them, those being either "Lengthy" or "Potent" respectively. (Toggleable)
- Textures differentiating potions that have been enhanced using either redstone or glowstone. (Toggleable)

**Old Features:**
- A complete backport of the 1.19.4/1.20 potion re-colours. (Non-Configurable at the moment)
- The enchantment glint on potions has been removed. (Toggleable)

**Notes:**
- It was brought to my attention that this project would be well suited for a multi-loader setup like Architectury, so I'll be looking into it in the foreseeable future so this project can be available on both Forge and Fabric! (And Quilt by extension!)

- I'd love to look into variations in sounds for drinking the different varieties of potions, alongside other variant based sounds for the thrown potions.
